mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (session_id, table_number, status, final_amount, payment_key, order_id_toss, method, raw_response, approved_at, paid_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{tableNumber}, #{status}, #{finalAmount}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderIdToss}, #{method}, #{rawResponse}, #{approvedAt}, #{paidAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, table_number, status, final_amount, payment_key, order_id_toss, method, raw_response, approved_at, paid_at FROM payment WHERE payment_key = #{paymentKey} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, session_id, table_number, status, final_amount, payment_key, order_id_toss, method, raw_response, approved_at, paid_at FROM payment WHERE order_id_toss = #{orderIdToss} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, session_id, table_number, status, final_amount, payment_key, order_id_toss, method, raw_response, approved_at, paid_at FROM payment WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status = #{status}, paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, table_number, status, final_amount, payment_key, order_id_toss, method, raw_response, approved_at, paid_at FROM payment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
